data.title: LHV Group purchased its own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 15-21.08.2025, details unspecified.
data.description: LHV Group has reported the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange during the week of August 15th to 21st, 2025. The group has purchased an undisclosed number of shares during this period.

data.title: Coolidge National Medal of Honor Heritage Center appoints Tom Mundell as President and CEO, starting August 4, 2025.
data.description: The Coolidge National Medal of Honor Heritage Center in Chattanooga, Tennessee, has recently appointed Tom Mundell as its new President and CEO, starting from August 4, 2025. With over 35 years of leadership experience in philanthropy and strategic management, Mundell will lead the center in its mission.

data.title: China exploring yuan-backed stablecoin could challenge dollar's dominance in finance, but hurdles like liquidity and trust remain.
data.description: The possibility of Beijing introducing a stablecoin backed by the yuan represents a potential new development in the global financial landscape. However, analysts suggest that several challenges such as the continued dominance of the dollar, issues related to liquidity, and establishing trust in the new stablecoin could hinder its adoption. These factors may prove to be significant obstacles to the widespread acceptance of the yuan-backed stablecoin in the international financial system.

data.title: Banning virtual currency kiosks won't solve fraud issues. Warning systems can help intercept scams.
data.description: Restrictions on crypto ATMs negatively impact law-abiding users, as scammers continue to adjust their tactics. Implementing advanced warning mechanisms at these automated kiosks may help prevent fraudulent activities and protect customers.
European Central Bank's Nagel Emphasizes Need to Protect Central Bank Independence

data.title: Dwight Capital and Dwight Mortgage Trust finance $569 million in real estate loans in July 2025.
data.description: In Miami, Dwight Capital and its affiliate REIT, Dwight Mortgage Trust (“DMT”), successfully completed $569 million in real estate financings during July. This figure includes a construction take-out loan for LC Line and Low in Charleston, SC, along with 35-year fixed-rate HUD 223(f) loans for Elements Apartments in Santa Maria, CA, and The Plaza at Pikes Peak in Colorado Springs, CO. DMT also supplied a $110 million bridge loan for the refinancing of LC Line and Low, a recently built 277-unit mixed-use development.

data.title: E Split Corp. (TSX: ENS) announces distribution for August 2025 to Class A shareholders.
data.description: In Toronto on August 22, 2025, E Split Corp. (TSX: ENS) reported that a distribution for August 2025 will be paid to Class A shareholders. The exact payment amounts were not provided, but shareholders can anticipate receiving dividends in the near future.

data.title: Lilly (NYSE:LLY) to join Wells Fargo 20th Annual Healthcare Conference on Sept. 5, 2025 with Patrik Jonsson, EVP.
data.description: A global pharmaceutical company, Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY), is set to join the Wells Fargo 20th Annual Healthcare Conference on September 5, 2025. Patrik Jonsson, the executive vice president and president of Lilly International, will engage in a fireside chat at 9:30 a.m. during the conference.

data.title: Smilegate launches official community for RPG MIRESI: Invisible Future, unveils key visual. Featuring art by Kim Hyung-seop.
data.description: A new title, MIRESI: Invisible Future, has recently launched its official community channel. This subculture-themed collectible RPG boasts stunning visuals created by Art Director Hyung-seop "Hyulla" Kim and an original lore. The launch took place in SEOUL, South Korea on Aug 22, 2025. Fans can expect additional game details to be gradually revealed through the community channel. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting release.

data.title: Rocket Lab to launch 70th Electron mission; Shares up 63% in 2025. Watch the milestone launch.
data.description: On Saturday, Rocket Lab successfully completed its 70th Electron mission, marking a significant milestone for the SpaceX competitor. The company's shares have surged by 63% in 2025, showcasing strong investor confidence in its performance. This achievement highlights Rocket Lab's growing presence in the space industry and its capability to compete with established players like SpaceX. For those interested in witnessing Rocket Lab's success, details on how to watch the milestone launch can be found in the latest update.

data.title: Nuclear-related stocks down for the week due to AI market pause, part of broader trend.
data.description: Stocks in the nuclear sector were experiencing a decrease in value for the week, in line with a general slowdown in the AI stock market. This suggests that the nuclear industry is not shielded from the current market downturn influenced by AI technology. The trend indicates a potential weekly decline in the value of nuclear-related stocks, mirroring the broader market conditions.

data.title: Workday stock fell after reporting Q2 earnings above estimates, but revenue guidance disappoints.
data.description: Following the release of its second-quarter earnings report, Workday saw a decline in its stock value. The software maker exceeded earnings estimates but its revenue guidance met expectations. The company's stock fell as a result. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Nook Coffee Bar opens in London, Ohio with support from Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea's program, serving specialty drinks.
data.description: In downtown London, Ohio, The Nook Coffee Bar recently opened its doors after following Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea's 7 Steps to Success program. Established on August 22, 2025, the cafe fulfills a cherished ambition, offering a variety of specialty coffee beverages to its customers. The cozy setting aims to foster a sense of community and is situated at a prime location in the area.

data.title: Philippines proposes holding 10,000 Bitcoin as strategic reserve, requiring 2,000 BTC purchase yearly for 5 years, held for 20 years.
data.description: Under the proposed legislation, the central bank is mandated to purchase 2,000 Bitcoin each year for a duration of five years and retain these assets for a minimum of twenty years.
